channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay pushes back after Bill Belichick claims team pumped in crowd noise: '1000% fictional'
item.description: During his latest guest spot on the “ManningCast" the former NFL coach asserted that the Indianapolis Colts used fake crowd noise during a game at the RCA Dome.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thieves slipped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's wrist, police say
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month outside a horse racing track in a Los Angeles suburb and slipped an expensive watch off his wrist as he jostled through the crowd, police said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mets beat Phillies 7-2 behind Alonso and Manaea to take 2-1 lead in NLDS
item.description: Pete Alonso launched another homer off Aaron Nola, and Sean Manaea took a two-hit shutout into the eighth inning as the New York Mets beat the Philadelphia Phillies 7-2 in Game 3 of their NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Saints QB Derek Carr likely sidelined for multiple weeks with oblique injury: reports
item.description: The four-time Pro Bowler suffered the injury in the fourth quarter of the Saints' 26-13 loss to the defending champion Chiefs on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia university leaders ask NCAA to ban transgender women from sports
item.description: The regents who govern Georgia’s public universities and colleges want the NCAA to ban transgender women from participating in women’s sports.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Amy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jets owner Woody Johnson pleads with Haason Reddick to end holdout: 'You'll fit right in'
item.description: New York Jets owner Woody Johnson had to answer for his decision to fire head coach Robert Saleh, but he also implored Haason Reddick to "get in your car, drive down 95" to end holdout.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luis Tiant dies at 83; pitching legend was part of storied 1975 Boston Red Sox team
item.description: The Cuban pitcher, nicknamed “El Tiante,” was a three-time MLB All-Star and four-time 20-game winner.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Patriots will go with first-round draft pick Drake Maye and bench QB Jacoby Brissett, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the decision says the New England Patriots are planning to give first-round draft pick Drake Maye his first pro start in the hopes of ending a four-game losing streak under veteran journeyman quarterback Jacoby Brissett.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy Golen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jets owner says firing of Saleh will bring 'new energy' to one of franchise's 'most talented teams'
item.description: Woody Johnson sensed his struggling New York Jets needed a change — and now. So the owner made the stunning decision Tuesday to fire coach Robert Saleh just five games into his fourth season after the team's 2-3 start following a 23-17 loss to Minnesota in London on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: De La Salle dominates NFL Academy with lopsided 31-9 win in London
item.description: After cross-continental trip, De La Salle still undefeated with historic win over NFL Academy in London
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: 1 dead after shooting at youth football game in Colorado, police say
item.description: A shooting at a youth football game in Colorado Springs has left one person dead. Police are still investigating, and no arrests have been made.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia WR Colbie Young arrested on charges of battery and assault on an unborn child
item.description: Georgia wide receiver Colbie Young has been arrested on charges of battery and assault on an unborn child.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jets security had to escort Robert Saleh out of team building after firing: reports
item.description: New York Jets head coach Robert Saleh was reportedly escorted out of the team facility by security after being fired by the team on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brother of Saints wide receiver Chris Olave questions lack of use in loss to Chiefs
item.description: Josh Olave, the brother of New Orleans Saints wideout Chris Olave, took to social media to complain about his brother's lack of targets in Monday's loss to the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US Ryder Cup captain Bradley says security will be watching if Bethpage Black crowd gets nasty
item.description: U.S. Ryder Cup captain Keegan Bradley offered a warning Tuesday about Bethpage Black that does not need a special sign by the first tee: Organizers will have security inside the ropes to make sure the New York crowd doesn't get out of control.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Grimace takes the 7 train to the Mets game
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – Like many other Mets fans, Grimace took the No. 7 train to the Mets game at Citi Field Tuesday. The Amazins sold out Citi Field for Game 3 of the National League Division Series against the Phillies. Given the crowd, fans were encouraged to take public transit to the game.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: 8 Real Salt Lake players and staff nominated for MLS end-of-season awards
item.description: Real Salt Lake head coach Pablo Mastroeni and seven players have been named to the shortlist of nominees for Major League Soccer's end-of-season awards, highlighting the Utah club's standout 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Carson Lantz, ABC 4

item.title: Aaron Rodgers needs to step up as Jets remain stagnant
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are 2-3. All the criticism is justified. They do not appear to be a group that is getting better week in and week out, they look to be rotting away. Talk of the relationship between the head coach Robert Saleh and quarterback Aaron Rodgers.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Washington pulls away in 4th quarter to beat No. 10 Michigan 27-17 in title game rematch
item.description: Washington quarterback Will Rogers watched the final seconds tick away and wondered if the field at Husky Stadium was about to be flooded with purple.
item.dc:creator: TIM BOOTH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Backlash over San Jose State University transgender volleyball player 'isn't about sports,' advocates say
item.description: (KRON) -- Four teams forfeited matches against the San Jose State University women's volleyball team since a lawsuit was filed on behalf of several NCAA athletes, including SJSU's team captain. According to the lawsuit filed on September 23, one of SJSU's volleyball players is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: WFLA's Bucified Bert featured in Amazon Prime show with Bucs' QB Baker Mayfield
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are set to face off against the Atlanta Falcons during Thursday Night Football, streaming live tonight on Amazon's Prime Video.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake plays Minnesota to scoreless draw
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring eight goals in its last three games, Real Salt Lake was unable to find the back of the net in a scoreless draw with Minnesota Wednesday night at America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
